overall.description: First-person exploration through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring rain-slicked streets illuminated by vibrant holographic billboards and neon signage. The player character transitions from open urban intersections to covered alleyways and ascends a dramatic red-lit staircase, showcasing the game's futuristic cyberpunk aesthetic.

events.description: turning right from open intersection onto sidewalk path

agents.ego_description: navigating through wet city streets surrounded by towering buildings with massive holographic billboards

entered.detail: large floating advertisement displaying purple neon graphics on building facade
tall futuristic building with illuminated windows and reflective glass surface
raised concrete roadway structure crossing above the street level
artificial palm tree wrapped in purple and red neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide futuristic intersection at night, dominated by towering glass skyscrapers and massive holographic billboards casting colorful reflections on the wet asphalt. The camera moves forward through the open space before turning right onto the sidewalk, with sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic visible in the neon-lit environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pedestrian sidewalk with storefronts and benches

events.description: approaching building entrance with bright brooklyn barista signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the red-paved sidewalk past pedestrians and illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: sitting on bench against building wall

entered.detail: bright orange neon sign for coffee shop above entrance
futuristic automated vendor with glowing interface
yellow seating area with people resting

segments.scene_description: Walking along a distinctive red-paved sidewalk lined with neon storefronts and holographic trees. The camera passes pedestrians resting on benches and approaches the brightly lit Brooklyn Barista entrance, with the glass skyscraper now closer on the left and various vending machines visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered service alley with green walls and graffiti

events.description: entering covered alleyway from open street with green fluorescent lighting
approaching red-lit staircase at end of alley

agents.ego_description: entering a narrow covered alleyway with green metal walls and scattered debris on the ground

concrete wall covered in blue and purple spray paint art
orange metal container overflowing with garbage bags
red and black automated vendor with 'Brospeh Brewing Co' advertisement

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow covered alleyway illuminated by green fluorescent lights. The walls are lined with metal fencing and vibrant graffiti, while trash and debris litter the concrete floor. The camera follows an NPC through this enclosed space, passing vending machines and approaching a distant red glow from a staircase at the alley's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit stairwell with red illuminated steps

events.description: reaching top of stairs where red lighting transitions to darker ambient light

agents.ego_description: climbing a narrow staircase illuminated by red neon strip lights on each step

notable_agents.action: climbing stairs ahead wearing white shirt and dark pants

entered.detail: concrete stairs with bright red neon strips on each step edge
colorful spray paint art covering the stairwell walls
large illuminated advertisement showing woman with purple hair at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: Ascending a dramatic staircase where each step is outlined in glowing red neon light. The narrow concrete walls are covered in graffiti, and other pedestrians climb ahead. At the top, a large holographic billboard becomes visible as the lighting transitions from intense red to darker ambient tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level walkway with dark ambient lighting

events.description: exiting stairwell to upper platform area with reduced lighting

agents.ego_description: reaching the top of the stairs and entering a darker upper level walkway

entered.detail: open concrete area at top of stairs with scattered debris
narrow passage leading forward into darker sections of the building
extensive wall art featuring cyberpunk imagery and Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: Exiting the stairwell onto an upper platform where the intense red lighting gives way to darker, more subdued ambient light. The area features extensive graffiti murals on the walls and opens into a narrow passage leading deeper into the structure, marking the transition from the enclosed stairwell to the upper level walkways.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, neon-drenched urban intersection into the claustrophobic depths of a graffiti-covered industrial complex. It begins by gliding through a futuristic plaza of towering glass skyscrapers and holographic billboards, moving from the wet asphalt onto a red-paved sidewalk lined with glowing storefronts and holographic trees. As the camera passes the brightly lit entrance of the Brooklyn Barista, the open city shifts into a narrow covered alleyway illuminated by green fluorescent lights and cluttered with debris. The scene then transitions from the green glow of the alley to a dramatic ascent up a staircase outlined in intense red neon, following other pedestrians upward through graffiti-strewn walls. Finally, the camera exits the stairwell onto an upper platform, where the vivid red light fades into subdued ambient tones as the path opens into a series of dark, mural-lined walkways.
